page.title: Category:Architecture of Takamori Town, Nagano Prefecture

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[長野県]][[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:たかもりまち}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:長野県高森町の建築物]]|version=94075030}} [[ja:Category:長野県高森町の建築物]]
==Old Content==
(2025-05-15T22:06:47Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Taisan Shrine]].
[[sn:長野県高森町の建築物]] [[ja:Category:長野県高森町の建築物]] {{translated page|ja|Category:長野県高森町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Takamori, Nagano]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:

{{デフォルトソート:たかもりまち}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
